THE COURT VACATED THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/17/14. THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 4/13/15 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT DISCOVERY IS RE-OPENED OVER DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Vacated

Defts' Motion For Order Dismissing Plaintiffs' Action Before Trial
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Defendants' Motion For Order Dismissing Plaintiffs' Action Before Trial is taken off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Action;Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration And Exhibits
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC. AND THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs Action is granted. No opposition filed. The discovery Judge Pro Tem issued an order that prevents plaintiff from presenting expert testimony. Plaintiff will therefore be unable to establish his prima face case and dismissal is warranted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Excluding Plaintiffs Expert Testimony At Trial; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration And Exhibits
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance by either counsel, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC., THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'S Motion For Order Excluding Plaintiffs Expert Testimony At Trial as follows: Motion unopposed. Plaintiff failed to timely disclose experts and has not brought a timely motion for belated submission of experts pursuant to C.C.P. 2034.710. Therefore, the motion for order excluding plaintiffs' expert testimony at trial is granted. (Moving party to prepare a proposed order.) Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Steve Schultz, Esq. of the Law Office of Steven Schultz, Tel. 916.922.2310, counsel for plaintiffs, and moving party;
Douglas Harris, Tel. 510.228.9618, and Chantelle Harris, Tel. 510.684.0939, plaintiffs and opposing party.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel did not object to plaintiffs presenting their opposition to the Court at the time of the hearing. The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: For good cause shown, STEVEN H. SCHULTZ, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD for plaintiffs Douglas Harris, Sr., Chantelle Harris, and Douglas Harris, Jr., a minor by and through his guardian ad litem, Gloria Nelson is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
THE LAW OFFICE OF STEVEN H. SCHULTZ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS DOUGLAS HARRIS, CHANTELLE HARRIS AND DOUGLAS HARRIS is denied without prejudice. Per CRC 3.1362(a), the motion must be made on the judicial council form. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
